focus: local business ideas solvable with AI and simple automation

search_audit.previous_bias: Hacker News, Product Hunt, and GitHub Trending overrepresent developer tools, AI infrastructure, and SaaS launches.
search_audit.decision: Use HN only as a side-channel. Local business ideas should be sourced from operational pain near the transaction.

signals.signal: Adult recreational sports leagues are growing; volleyball is one of the most popular league sports.
signals.idea_fit: AI booking and coordination for volleyball, pickleball, padel, and other weekly games.

signals.signal: Volleyball organizers publish times, levels, prices, and signup calls directly in Telegram posts.
signals.idea_fit: Telegram bot can handle signups, level matching, waitlists, reminders, and payment status.

signals.signal: Small businesses increasingly invest in practical AI, including scheduling and customer communication.
signals.idea_fit: Sell narrow AI admin tools instead of broad AI platforms.

signals.signal: Home service businesses lose leads when calls are missed and voicemails are abandoned.
signals.idea_fit: AI receptionist that captures job details and books callbacks for plumbers, cleaners, HVAC, and repair crews.

signals.signal: Appointment businesses lose revenue to no-shows and weak cancellation workflows.
signals.idea_fit: No-show autopilot with reminders, deposits, waitlists, and empty-slot refilling.

signals.signal: Pickleball locations continue expanding, creating court booking and programming pressure.
signals.idea_fit: Small-club court booking and open-play management for clubs that do not need a heavy enterprise system.

signals.signal: Telegram booking assistants are actively positioned for small service businesses.
signals.idea_fit: Competition confirms demand; wedge should be a specific vertical and setup service.

signals.signal: Russian-language AI booking products promise Telegram-based client booking and message handling.
signals.idea_fit: Local demand exists; opportunity is in packaged niche workflows such as sports, kids classes, and salons.
